messages.content: You are a helpful, concise assistant.

After a Windows update last night, my laptop won't connect to my home Wi-Fi. It sees the network, asks for the password, then says "Can't connect to this network." My phone connects fine. I already rebooted the router and ran the Windows network troubleshooter with no fix. Please give me exactly 3 quick checks I can do next on the laptop, one short sentence per bullet.
